scope_instance_model: ClickHouse emulation root across all emulated databases roots keyspaces collections indices or graphs
policy_surface: global authentication authorization default-deny role mapping audit and diagnostic redaction
parser_worker_rule: parser worker may classify and render policy failures only
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup may install policy metadata through admitted Role C setup and route trusted Role A reports
engine_rule: engine enforces identity authorization MGA and final denial result

scope_instance_model: each reference-presented database schema keyspace collection graph index subspace tenant or database-number root
policy_surface: per-database security policy inherited from global policy with explicit local overrides
parser_worker_rule: parser worker selects policy context from resolved catalog identity only
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup may create catalog overlay rows for each emulated database policy during Role C setup
engine_rule: engine resolves UUID identity and applies admitted policy decisions per object

scope_instance_model: users roles sessions service accounts ACL entries grants and reference-visible principals
policy_surface: authentication handshake principal visibility role membership privilege lookup and safe failure vectors
parser_worker_rule: parser worker cannot authenticate or authorize; it only parses credentials and renders safe failures
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup may project reference-compatible principal catalog views without exposing hidden SB principals
engine_rule: engine owns credential verification session binding and authorization

scope_instance_model: system tables information schema metadata APIs command reports and describe outputs
policy_surface: metadata visibility filtering catalog seed row overlays and hidden object redaction
parser_worker_rule: parser worker cannot bypass catalog visibility by name lookup or descriptor cache
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup projects reference-compatible catalog views from SB catalog seed overlays
engine_rule: engine owns catalog reads UUID resolution and policy-filtered visibility

scope_instance_model: CREATE ALTER DROP DATABASE TABLESPACE EXTENSION PLUGIN MODULE FILE REPOSITORY and equivalent reference commands
policy_surface: security-deny or trusted environment setup route classification for non-SBsql physical lifecycle syntax
parser_worker_rule: parser worker must classify reference lifecycle commands and emit security-deny route where required
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup Role C may install an emulated reference environment only through admitted package setup
engine_rule: engine accepts real database authority only from SBsql/internal admitted surfaces

scope_instance_model: backup restore snapshot repair compaction checkpoint replication endpoint cluster topology admin and external service operations
policy_surface: operational allow deny route matrix with audit events and redaction
parser_worker_rule: parser worker cannot perform operational authority and cannot contact external endpoints
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup Role A may request admitted migration or report routes only where packet permits
engine_rule: engine enforces operational policy and rejects physical authority not admitted by SB

scope_instance_model: replication ETL import export logical feed change stream CDC and live migration surfaces
policy_surface: migration route policy ownership source authorization target authorization and audit retention
parser_worker_rule: parser worker may parse and classify migration commands only
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup Role A owns trusted migration route calls after admission and policy checks
engine_rule: engine owns transaction boundaries MGA snapshots catalog mutation and final write admission

scope_instance_model: error codes warnings notices explain plans denied operations and security audit records
policy_surface: message vector mapping redaction timing disclosure and audit correlation rules
parser_worker_rule: parser worker renders only allowed reference-compatible diagnostics from message vectors
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup supplies reference-compatible report payloads without hidden-path disclosure
engine_rule: engine supplies canonical error authorization and plan vectors

scope_instance_model: all reference management security catalog database-presentation migration replication and support routines
policy_surface: registered reference-only sbup management package ABI authorization privilege matrix and exact refusal behavior
parser_worker_rule: parser worker emits SBLR management request and source evidence only; parser cannot choose arbitrary package authority
parser_support_udr_rule: sbup package implements standard ABI routines after engine authorization and may only mutate emulation metadata catalog security through admitted engine APIs
engine_rule: engine resolves registered package by active emulation profile enforces EMULATION privileges MGA and SBsql-only external authority denial
